segments.text: That's something that Pikachu is so good at,
multi-hits, there, able to destroy the bombs
that can be so annoying in a lot of match-ups,
but Pikachu being able to do it,
and look at that, from down,

full_text: That's something that Pikachu is so good at, multi-hits, there, able to destroy the bombs that can be so annoying in a lot of match-ups, but Pikachu being able to do it, and look at that, from down,
